cover.title: running a fleet is an operating problem, not a model one
cover.sub: past one agent, the hard part stops being the model and starts being coordination.

slides.title: what breaks past one agent
slides.body: no shared memory. no handoff. two agents grab the same task and step on each other. the model didn't fail. the operating layer was never there.

slides.title: the fix is a control plane

pairs.broke: agents coordinate by luck and overlap
pairs.fix: shared memory, handoffs, and task ownership

slides.title: point your existing agents at it
slides.body: wrai.th is an open-source control plane. it doesn't replace your agents. it coordinates the ones you already run.

cta.title: wrai.th, open source
cta.sub: a control plane for a fleet of agents: coordination, memory, handoffs.
